title: BRIDGEWAY OF HOPE - 211info
text: BRIDGEWAY OF HOPE BRIDGEWAY OF HOPE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides faith-based housing for men for up to 24 months who wish to live clean and sober. Services provided to clients include case management, work force development, assistance with getting ID, and overcoming other barriers to stability. 6655 NE 82nd Avenue Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Men age 18 and older who have previously gone through an inpatient treatment program. There is no maximum period of length on when the inpatient program was completed. Hours: Intake: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (971) 230-5310 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (971) 230-5310 Lloyd Potter Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for more information FEES: $550/month program fee. Individuals who are currently unemployed may apply for a scholarship for a period up to 1 month. DOCUMENTS: ID card LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Recovery Homes/Halfway Houses * Men Transitional Housing/Shelter * Men If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BRIDGEWAY OF HOPE
